title: Plai Wasp Repellent for Outdoor Areas Weather Resistant Decoy False Wasp Nests, Garden Wasp Deterrent, No More Wasp
bullet_points: Easy to Hang & Use: Each pack contains 4 decoy nests
Friendly - Will not trap or harm bees or beneficial insects, It works on a very simple principle: wasps are territorial and avoid other nests, close to the actual nest, wasp nests so realistic.
Hang the wasp nest decoy are under eaves, decks or under a tree, better hang 4-12 feet from outdoor living area and 6-8 feet above the ground.
Wasp deterrents, can folds flat for easy shipping to bring on picnicking, camping or others outdoor activity.

Perfect Solution - Wasps provide vital pest control services within an ecosystem and feed on other nuisance insects such as aphids & mosquito. Plai natural wasp nest it does not harm or kill them only as a scarecrow for wasps.
